column3: ROCK CLIMB IS NOW ACCESSIBLE ! YOU CAN NOW BACKTRACK TO PREVIOUS AREAS AND FIGHT THESE TRAINERS :
There are 4 items all around her
GALACTIC HQ (do not forget to talk to the grunt standing outside the galactic hq building to encounter Looker and start the event)

- right teleporter leads you to            TM49s Snatch
GALACTIC HQ (ENTERING FROM GALACTIC WAREHOUSE) ~ SECOND FLOOR
if you take the staircase past him it leads you to a close door you can't open yet. this path is optional
if you take the teleporter to his left it leads you to Scientist Frederick [830] and the path to the key needed to progress
GALACTIC HQ (ENTERING FROM GALACTIC WAREHOUSE) ~ FIRST FLOOR
You can go around hilm to get to a Dubious Disc and a staircase
The staircase leads back into the Galactic Wharehouse

GALACTIC WAREHOUSE ~ B1F (there is a galactic grunt hiding, he doesn't fight you. before him there is a Toxic Orb and past him there is the Galactic Key. you can go back up into the upper floors to get TM21s Frustration but you don't have to)
